intrigue.name: Ambush
intrigue.description: Combat: +4 strength.

intrigue.name: Allied Armada
intrigue.description: If you have a faction alliance: pay 2 spice to gain +7 strength.

intrigue.name: Bindu Suspension
intrigue.description: At the start of your turn: draw 1 card. You may pass your turn (instead of taking an Agent or Reveal turn).

intrigue.name: Bribery
intrigue.description: Pay 2 Solari to gain 1 influence with a faction of your choice.

intrigue.name: Bypass Protocol
intrigue.description: Acquire a card that costs 3 or less —OR— pay 2 spice to acquire a card that costs 5 or less to the top of your deck.

intrigue.name: Calculated Hire
intrigue.description: Pay 1 spice to take the Mentat from its designated space in the Landsraad.

intrigue.name: Charisma
intrigue.description: Gain 2 persuasion during your Reveal turn this round.

intrigue.name: CHOAM Shares
intrigue.description: Pay 7 Solari to gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: Corner the Market
intrigue.description: Endgame: If you have at least two The Spice Must Flow, gain 1 VP. If you have more The Spice Must Flow than each opponent, gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: Councilor’s Dispensation
intrigue.description: If you have a seat on the High Council: gain 2 spice.

intrigue.name: Dispatch an Envoy
intrigue.description: The card you play this turn has the following icons.

intrigue.name: Double Cross
intrigue.description: An opponent of your choice loses 1 troop in the Conflict and you deploy 1 troop from your supply to the Conflict.

intrigue.name: Favored Subject
intrigue.description: Gain 1 influence with the Emperor.

intrigue.name: Guild Authorization
intrigue.description: Gain 1 influence with the Spacing Guild.

intrigue.name: Infiltrate
intrigue.description: Enemy Agents don’t block your next Agent at board spaces this turn.

intrigue.name: Know Their Ways
intrigue.description: Gain 1 influence with the Fremen.

intrigue.name: Master Tactician
intrigue.description: Combat: +3 strength —OR— Retreat up to three of your troops.

intrigue.name: Plans Within Plans
intrigue.description: Endgame: If you have 3+ influence on three faction tracks, gain 1 VP —OR— if you have 3+ influence on four faction tracks, gain 2 VP.

intrigue.name: Private Army
intrigue.description: Pay 2 spice to gain +5 strength.

intrigue.name: Rapid Mobilization
intrigue.description: Deploy any number of your garrisoned troops to the Conflict.

intrigue.name: Recruitment Mission
intrigue.description: Gain 1 water during your Reveal turn this round. You may put cards you acquire on top of your deck.

intrigue.name: Refocus
intrigue.description: Shuffle your discard pile into your deck, then draw 1 card.

intrigue.name: Reinforcements
intrigue.description: Pay 3 Solari to gain 3 troops. If it’s your Reveal turn, you may deploy any of these troops to the Conflict.

intrigue.name: Secret of the Sisterhood
intrigue.description: Gain 1 influence with the Bene Gesserit.

intrigue.name: Staged Incident
intrigue.description: Lose three of your troops in the Conflict to gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: The Sleeper Must Awaken
intrigue.description: Pay 4 spice to gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: Tiebreaker
intrigue.description: Combat: +2 strength —OR— Endgame: counts as 10 spice for tiebreakers.

intrigue.name: To the Victor…
intrigue.description: When you win a Conflict: gain 3 spice.

intrigue.name: Urgent Mission
intrigue.description: Recall one of your Agents.

intrigue.name: Water of Life
intrigue.description: Pay 1 water and 1 spice to draw 3 cards.

intrigue.name: Water Peddlers Union
intrigue.description: Gain 1 water.

intrigue.name: Windfall
intrigue.description: Gain 2 Solari.

intrigue.name: Blackmail
intrigue.description: Combat: Lose 1 influence (your choice) to gain +5 strength.

intrigue.name: Cannon Turrets
intrigue.description: Combat: +2 strength. Each opponent retreats 1 dreadnought from the Conflict.

intrigue.name: Strategic Push
intrigue.description: Combat: +2 strength. If you win this Conflict: +2 Solari.

intrigue.name: Second Wave
intrigue.description: Combat: +2 strength. Deploy up to 2 units from your garrison to the Conflict.

intrigue.name: War Chest
intrigue.description: Combat: Pay 2 Solari to gain +4 strength —OR— Endgame: If you have 10+ Solari, gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: Finesse
intrigue.description: Combat: +2 strength —OR— Plot: Lose 1 influence (your choice) to gain 1 influence (your choice).

intrigue.name: Advanced Weaponry
intrigue.description: Combat: If you have 3 tech: +4 strength —OR— Plot: Pay 3 Solari to commission 1 dreadnought.

intrigue.name: Grand Conspiracy
intrigue.description: Endgame: If you meet 3 of 4 conditions (2 dreadnoughts, 1 SMF, 4+ influence on 2 tracks, High Council): 1 VP. All 4: 2 VP.

intrigue.name: Strongarm
intrigue.description: Lose a troop to gain 1 influence on the faction track where you placed an Agent this turn.

intrigue.name: Ixian Probe
intrigue.description: Discard 2 cards to draw 2 cards.

intrigue.name: Cull
intrigue.description: Pay 1 Solari to trash 1 card.

intrigue.name: Secret Forces
intrigue.description: Gain 2 troops if you have a seat on the High Council.

intrigue.name: Quid Pro Quo
intrigue.description: Pay 2 spice to gain 1 influence on each faction track where you currently have an Agent.

intrigue.name: Glimpse the Path
intrigue.description: Pay 1 spice to gain 1 water and draw 1 card.

intrigue.name: Diversion
intrigue.description: When you deploy 4 units to the Conflict in one turn, gain +1 on the Shipping track.

intrigue.name: Expedite
intrigue.description: Pay 1 spice to advance 1 space on the Shipping track.

intrigue.name: Machine Culture
intrigue.description: Plot: Acquire 1 tech tile —OR— Endgame: If you have 3 tech: gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: Harvest Cells
intrigue.description: Combat: When you lose 3+ troops at the end of a Conflict: +2 specimen. You may also acquire a Tleilaxu card (paying its normal cost).

intrigue.name: Harvest Cells
intrigue.description: Combat: When you lose 3+ troops at the end of a Conflict: +2 specimen. You may also acquire a Tleilaxu card (paying its normal cost).

intrigue.name: Vicious Talents
intrigue.description: Combat: +2 strength. If research lvl 1: +2 more. If research lvl 2: +2 more (2–6 strength).

intrigue.name: Vicious Talents
intrigue.description: Combat: +2 strength. If research lvl 1: +2 more. If research lvl 2: +2 more (2–6 strength).

intrigue.name: Gruesome Sacrifice
intrigue.description: Combat: Lose 2 of your troops in the Conflict to gain +2 specimen and +1 beetle.

intrigue.name: Gruesome Sacrifice
intrigue.description: Combat: Lose 2 of your troops in the Conflict to gain +2 specimen and +1 beetle.

intrigue.name: Breakthrough
intrigue.description: Plot: +1 research.

intrigue.name: Illicit Dealings
intrigue.description: Plot: +1 beetle (advance on the Tleilaxu track).

intrigue.name: Illicit Dealings
intrigue.description: Plot: +1 beetle (advance on the Tleilaxu track).

intrigue.name: Disguised Bureaucrat
intrigue.description: Plot: If research lvl 1: +1 spice. If research lvl 2: +1 influence (your choice).

intrigue.name: Shadowy Bargain
intrigue.description: Plot: +1 specimen —OR— Endgame: +1 beetle (advance on the Tleilaxu track).

intrigue.name: Tleilaxu Puppet
intrigue.description: Plot: +1 persuasion this round —OR— Endgame: If you have a High Council seat and research lvl 2: +1 VP.

intrigue.name: Study Melange
intrigue.description: Plot: +1 spice —OR— Endgame: If you have 3 spice and research lvl 2: +1 VP.

intrigue.name: Counterattack
intrigue.description: Plot: Deploy up to 2 troops from your garrison —OR— Combat: If an opponent played a combat intrigue: +4 strength.

intrigue.name: Economic Positioning
intrigue.description: Plot: Retreat 2 troops to gain +3 Solari —OR— Endgame: If you have 10 Solari: +1 VP.

ability.name: Spice Addict
ability.description: Whenever you harvest spice, gain 1 less and draw a card.

leaders.name: BARON VLADIMIR HARKONNEN

ability.name: Masterstroke
ability.description: When you deploy 4+ troops to the Conflict in a turn, choose 2 Factions and gain 1 Influence with each.

leaders.signetRingText: Pay 1 Solari to gain 1 Intrigue card.

leaders.name: Glossu "The Beast" Rabban

ability.name: Arrakis Fiefdom
ability.description: Start the game with additional resources: 1 Spice, 1 Solari.

leaders.signetRingText: Gain 1 Troop OR 2 Troops if you have at least one Faction Alliance.

ability.name: Ruthless Negotiator
ability.description: Whenever you pay Solari for the cost of a board space: Draw 1 card.

leaders.name: Duke Leto Atreides

ability.name: Landsraad popularity
ability.description: Sending an Agent to a Landsraad board space costs you 1 Solari less.

leaders.signetRingText: Spend 1 Spice: Gain 1 Influence with a Faction where an opponent has more Influence than you.

leaders.name: Helena Richese

ability.name: Eyes Everywhere
ability.description: Enemy Agents don't block your Agents at Landsraad or City board spaces.

leaders.signetRingText: Remove and replace a card in the Imperium Row. During your Reveal turn this round, you may acquire the removed card for 1 Persuasion less.

ability.name: Connections
ability.description: When you take a High Council seat: Gain 1 Influence.

ability.name: Prescience
ability.description: You may look at the top card of your deck at any time.

leaders.name: Prince Rhombur Vernius

ability.name: Ixian Royalty
ability.description: Your dreadnoughts have a strength of 4 instead of 3.

leaders.signetRingText: Buy 1 tech, or add 1 tech negotiator.

ability.name: Intelligence
ability.description: Game start: look at the top 2 Intrigue cards, keep one (once per game).

ability.name: Spice Royalty
ability.description: You start with no water. When you gain Solari on your turn, increase the amount by 1.

leaders.name: Archduke Armand Ecaz

ability.name: Houses' Confidence
ability.description: If you have at least 2 agents on Yellow/Blue/Green spaces upon reveal, you may trash 1 card in play.

leaders.signetRingText: You may acquire a card that costs 3 or less.

ability.name: Hidden Pact
ability.description: Round start: set a card aside. When played on your 2nd turn: +1 Solari, or if only 1 agent icon +1 spice.

leaders.name: Tessia Vernius

ability.name: Subtle Subterfuge
ability.description: Place snooper tokens on influence tracks.

leaders.signetRingText: −1 influence (choose) → +1 influence with a faction where you have a snooper token.

techTiles.name: Artillery
techTiles.description: Reveal: +1 sword for each revealed card that provides ≥1 sword this turn.

techTiles.name: Detonation Devices
techTiles.description: When you win a Conflict with a dreadnought in it: +1 VP and return dreadnought to supply, or take control normally.

techTiles.name: Disposal Facility
techTiles.description: Reveal: if persuasion ≥ 6, you may trash one card in play.

techTiles.name: Flagship
techTiles.description: Pay 4 Solari → recruit 3 troops (once per round).

techTiles.name: Holoprojectors
techTiles.description: Discard 1 card → draw 1 card (once per round).

techTiles.name: Holtzman Engine
techTiles.description: Round Start: draw 1 card. Endgame: +1 VP if you have ≥2 Spice Must Flow.

techTiles.name: Invasion Ships
techTiles.description: Agent (once per round): discard 1 → enemy agents do not block your agent this turn.

techTiles.name: Memocorders
techTiles.description: Endgame: +1 VP if you have ≥3 influence on all four tracks.

techTiles.name: Restricted Ordinance
techTiles.description: Reveal: +4 swords if you have a High Council seat.

techTiles.name: Sonic Snoopers
techTiles.description: Trash this → put intrigue on bottom of deck, draw that many.

techTiles.name: Spaceport
techTiles.description: Passive: you may put cards you acquire on top of your deck.

techTiles.name: Spy Satellites
techTiles.description: Pay 3 spice, trash this → +1 VP. Endgame: +1 VP per faction where you have ≤1 influence.

techTiles.name: Troop Transports
techTiles.description: When recruiting from Shipping track, recruit +1 troop (may deploy to Conflict).

techTiles.name: Windtraps
techTiles.description: When you win a Conflict: +1 water.
